// purpose: Production type-check for `vite build`. It covers ONLY the app source — not the *.test.* files, the __tests__/ guards, or the test setup shim — so a release build does not fail on test-only Node imports (node:fs/path, __dirname) and the shipped bundle's type surface is pure browser DOM. The full project (tests included, with node types) is type-checked by `npm run typecheck` and exercised by Vitest. (EXC-WIRE-04 / SURFACE-001: the prior `tsc --noEmit` over `src` failed here, which is why no real bundle was ever embedded.)
